clue: Dragon- And Ghost-Type Moves Power boost item
extract: The Griseous Orb (Japanese: はっきんだま Platinum Orb) is a type of held item introduced in Pokémon Platinum. It boosts the power of Dragon- and Ghost-type moves when held by Giratina, and prior to Pokémon Legends: Arceus, it would change Giratina into its Origin Forme while held. It is one of the orbs associated with the Pokémon of myth.
